title: anthyllis vulneraria var. dillenii
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria var. dillenii, also known as kidney vetch or common kidney vetch, is a flowering plant species native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its pink or purple flowers and hairy leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, inflammation, and skin conditions due to its astringent and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anthyllis vulneraria var. dillenii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Anthyllis vulneraria var. dillenii can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
